title: Connect Subitems from Overview Board to Items in Low Level Board
excerpt: I have an overview board with each of our projects as individual items. Each of these items has several subitems of the key dates for the project. I then have a low level project board built out for each project where I’…

posts.author: nolanhausler (Nolan Hausler)
posts.cookedHtml: I have an overview board with each of our projects as individual items. Each of these items has several subitems of the key dates for the project. I then have a low level project board built out for each project where I’d like to have a group with the same key dates as on the overview board. Is there a way to connect these items on the low level board to the same subitems on the overview board? I’d like to avoid having to manually update dates in both places given that it is the same information for two different audiences.

posts.author: Cleopatra-upstream (Cleopatra Luneburg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @nolanhausler

Without seeing your boards in more detail, see if multi board mirroring or the connected boards column can assist you.

We have been partnered with monday.com since 2017.

We specialise in building custom workflows, integrations, automations to make monday.com platform even more powerful within your workspace.

Especially for project management, which is one of the many areas of our expertise in.

Please book in a complimentary non obligation session here to discuss further.

Kind Regards,
Cleopatra Luneburg
upstream
